testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should display shuffle button with subdued color initially when no track is playing
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should display shuffle button with subdued color initially when no track is playing

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should change shuffle button to green when shuffle is enabled
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should change shuffle button to green when shuffle is enabled

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should return shuffle button to subdued when shuffle is disabled
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle Toggle should return shuffle button to subdued when shuffle is disabled

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should display repeat button with subdued color initially (repeat off)
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should display repeat button with subdued color initially (repeat off)

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should cycle repeat mode: off -> all (green) -> one (green, Repeat1 icon) -> off (subdued)
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should cycle repeat mode: off -> all (green) -> one (green, Repeat1 icon) -> off (subdued)

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should show Repeat1 icon when repeat mode is one
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Repeat Toggle should show Repeat1 icon when repeat mode is one

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should display 0:00 elapsed time initially
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should display 0:00 elapsed time initially

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should increment elapsed time every second while playing
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should increment elapsed time every second while playing

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should show total duration of current track
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Progress Bar (Timer) should show total duration of current track

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should restart track when repeat mode is one and track ends
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should restart track when repeat mode is one and track ends

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should go to first track when repeat mode is all on last track
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should go to first track when repeat mode is all on last track

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should stop playback when repeat mode is off on last track
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should stop playback when repeat mode is off on last track

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should advance to next track when current track ends with repeat off
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Track End Behavior should advance to next track when current track ends with repeat off

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Play/Pause Toggle should show Pause icon when playing
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Play/Pause Toggle should show Pause icon when playing

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Play/Pause Toggle should toggle between play and pause on click
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Play/Pause Toggle should toggle between play and pause on click

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Next/Previous Controls should advance to next track when next button is clicked
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Next/Previous Controls should advance to next track when next button is clicked

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Next/Previous Controls should go to previous track when previous button is clicked
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Next/Previous Controls should go to previous track when previous button is clicked

testcase.classname: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle with Track Transitions should advance through shuffled queue order when shuffle is enabled
testcase.name: PlayerBar Controls Behavior Tests Shuffle with Track Transitions should advance through shuffled queue order when shuffle is enabled
